message.content: {"direction": "different_scope", "rationale": "EDIT_A tightens to “fails significantly on length or efficiency constraints” and drops repetition as a criterion, while EDIT_B elaborates multiple failure modes including repetition (“it repeats large parts of the user's request or its own prior content”) and adds a nuanced carve-out for partial truncation (“truncation severity must be weighed against the completeness of what was delivered”). Both refine the standard but focus on different aspects (efficiency vs. detailed failure taxonomy and truncation nuance)."}
